personal.name: Deepansh Singh
personal.title: Web Developer & Engineering Student
personal.bio: I'm an engineering student with a deep passion for technology, software development, and building practical solutions. Skilled in web development, React Native, SQL, and problem solving — I bring ideas to life through clean code and intuitive design. With hands-on experience through projects like Sentinel Fuzz and Life Link, I'm constantly pushing boundaries and learning new technologies.
personal.relocate: Willing to relocate to Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh

projects.title: Sentinel Fuzz
projects.description: An advanced security testing tool designed to identify vulnerabilities through intelligent fuzz testing. Built to automate the process of finding bugs and security flaws in web applications and APIs.

projects.title: Life Link
projects.description: A life-saving application that connects people in need with emergency services and resources. Designed to bridge the gap between individuals and critical support systems with real-time connectivity.
